comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
## Yardstick
Use `full_database_cold_load` at `total_records=10,000` (social_media profile).

## Python baseline (fresh run, 2026-02-23)
- counts: users=163, posts=1,630, comments=8,207
- full_database_cold_load: **3354.440 ms**
- single_table_cold_load (context only): 51.253 ms

## Rust baseline
Blocked: Rust backend not importable via PyO3 (no `virtuus._rust`). `maturin develop --release` fails with compile errors in `rust/src/python.rs` (PyO3 API changes / borrow issues). Tracking fix in bug: virt-1abdce.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
## Rust baseline (fresh run, 2026-02-23)
- counts: users=163, posts=1,630, comments=8,207
- full_database_cold_load: **2929.900 ms**
- single_table_cold_load (context only): 42.069 ms

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Done: captured 10k Rust baseline and recorded alongside Python. Next: close task. Blockers: none.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
## Rust direct (CLI) benchmark — no Python harness (2026-02-23)
Method: `cargo run --release --bin virtuus -- query` with schema loading all tables, timed externally (Python `time.perf_counter`), 3 runs. Data dir: `/tmp/virtuus_bench_direct/social_media_total_10000_rust` (users=163, posts=1,630, comments=8,207). Schema: `/tmp/virtuus_bench_direct/schema.yml`.

Results (full DB cold load + query):
- runs_ms: [2758.239, 2853.011, 2810.492]
- mean_ms: **2807.248**
- min_ms: 2758.239

Note: this includes CLI startup + one query execution; still useful as a Rust-native load benchmark.
